title: I'm Here
overview: Koichi is convinced he'll never manage to become a hero, until he meets someone with an odd take on justice.

title: Takeoff
overview: Some people frown upon vigilante activities, but the least they could do is remember The Crawler's name.

title: Bee
overview: The drug Trigger is wreaking havoc all over town, but figuring out who's dealing it is easier said than done.

title: Top Runner
overview: What happens when pro heroes and vigilantes target the same villain? Is it possible to work as a team?

title: Judgment
overview: Koichi and Pop each find themselves considerably influenced by various events from their pasts.

title: Crossing Lines
overview: Hachisuka tries manipulating Stendhal into fighting targets of her choosing, but can anyone control him?

title: Makoto/Truth
overview: Makoto offers to help a struggling Koichi with his studies, but she requests something surprising in return.

title: Major
overview: The American hero Captain Celebrity sets up shop in Japan, and it isn't long before trouble begins.

title: Mom Descends!
overview: Koichi's mother is in town, and he's willing to take drastic measures so that she'll let him stay in Tokyo.

title: Event Announcement!
overview: Pop receives a request to perform at an upcoming local event, and she finds herself in need of guidance.

title: The Day Of
overview: Preparing for Narufest proves to be an uphill battle. Will teamwork be what gets everyone to the finish line?

title: Goodbye to Dad
overview: There's trouble when the power goes out at Narufest, all while Knuckleduster fights a very personal battle.

title: What a Man Takes with Him
overview: Narufest turned out to be a huge success, but our vigilantes must decide whether it's time for some changes.

title: Day-Tripping Down to Naniwa!
overview: Pop gets invited to a mascot-idol event in Osaka, and Koichi accompanies her.

title: Crabtastic Rampage!
overview: Koichi and Pop get dragged into an incident when a Trigger dealer unleashes a cast of rampaging robotic crabs!

title: Public and Private
overview: Tsukauchi's investigation into the Trigger network has hit a wall, and he turns to All Might for advice.

title: A Rational Man
overview: Koichi's in double trouble, facing down a villain who might clobber him, and Eraser Head who might arrest him!

title: The Man Returns
overview: Koichi and Pop get into more Trigger trouble, and we learn where Knuckleduster has been.

title: Rain and Clouds
overview: Koichi encounters Eraser Head, who reminiscences about his student days.

title: Glass Sky
overview: When he was young, Aizawa's inexperience and awkward Quirk forced him to grapple with his self-esteem.

title: A Sky with No Rain Left
overview: When Aizawa was a younger, he and his friend Shirakumo were forced into a fight with a giant villain...

title: Farewell Party!
overview: With his legal problems soon to be taken care of, Captain Celebrity makes plans to return to America.

title: Zero Hour
overview: Captain Celebrity's farewell party begins, but the Scarred Man has some unpleasant surprises in store...

title: Balloon Soul
overview: Captain Celebrity tries to save the Sky Egg with Koichi's help, while reminiscing on what brought him here.

title: This Is a Hero!
overview: The Sky Egg falls as Captain Celebrity hits his limit, with only one person capable of saving the day...

title: Graduation and Career Path
overview: Captain Celebrity returns to the United States, and Koichi must decide what to do with his future.
